tldr_zh: OpenAI發布GPT-Red自動紅隊測試系統強化模型安全，Microsoft和Apple等科技巨頭持續推進AI發展與政策調整。
tldr_en: OpenAI launches GPT-Red automated red teaming system to enhance AI safety; major tech companies advance AI strategies amid regulatory changes.

items.title_zh: OpenAI發布GPT-Red自動化紅隊系統強化模型安全性
items.title_en: OpenAI Releases GPT-Red Automated Red Teaming System for Enhanced Model Safety
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出GPT-Red，一個自動化紅隊測試系統，透過自我對弈來改進AI安全、對齊度和防止提示詞注入的能力。最新發布的GPT-5.6經過GPT-Red訓練，成為OpenAI迄今最強韌的版本。該系統自動化了對抗性測試流程，幫助模型抵禦網路攻擊。
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduces GPT-Red, an automated red teaming system using self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and robustness against prompt injection attacks. The latest GPT-5.6 trained against GPT-Red represents OpenAI's most robust release to date. The system automates adversarial testing to enhance defenses against cyberattacks.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推動聯邦與州級AI安全治理新框架
items.title_en: OpenAI Advances AI Safety Through State and Federal Governance Framework
items.summary_zh: OpenAI提出「反向聯邦制」(reverse federalism)的AI治理方案，透過州級法律幫助建立全國性的安全民主AI框架。這一方式讓各州法規成為構建統一AI安全政策的基礎，推動更有效的聯邦層級規管。
items.summary_en: OpenAI proposes a "reverse federalism" approach to AI governance, where state-level laws help establish a national framework for safe and democratic AI. This strategy uses state regulations as building blocks for effective federal-level AI policy and safety standards.

items.title_zh: Microsoft訓練銷售團隊貶低OpenAI和Anthropic競爭對手
items.title_en: Microsoft Trains Salespeople to Criticize OpenAI and Anthropic Competitors
items.summary_zh: 據報導，Microsoft正訓練銷售人員強調其內部AI模型比OpenAI和Anthropic產品更有效率且成本更低。此舉反映Microsoft在AI市場的競爭戰略，希望透過強調自身產品優勢來搶佔市場份額。
items.summary_en: Microsoft is reportedly training its sales team to position its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective alternatives to OpenAI and Anthropic offerings. This reflects Microsoft's competitive strategy in the AI market to gain market share through emphasizing product advantages.

items.title_zh: FCC主席Carr推動廢除39%電視台擁有權限制
items.title_en: FCC Chair Carr Plans to End 39% TV Station Ownership Cap Rule
items.summary_zh: 美國聯邦通信委員會(FCC)主席Carr宣布將在8月6日投票廢除全國廣播電視台擁有權限制，允許單一公司擁有超過全美39%電視戶的電視台。此舉將使大型傳播集團權力增強，引發輿論自由與媒體競爭的擔憂。
items.summary_en: FCC Chair Brendan Carr announced an August 6 vote to repeal the national TV ownership cap rule, which would allow a single company to own broadcast stations reaching over 39% of US TV households. This move strengthens major broadcasters' market power and raises concerns about media competition.

items.title_zh: Microsoft發布創紀錄的補丁數量同日曝出Windows零日漏洞
items.title_en: Microsoft Releases Record Patches on Day Windows Zero-Day Vulnerability Emerges
items.summary_zh: Microsoft在7月例行補丁日發布622個安全更新以修補產品漏洞，包括Exchange Server的多個高風險漏洞。然而同日HiveLegacy Windows零日漏洞被曝光，該漏洞被評為「強大的原始工具」且可能引發其他惡意活動，凸顯軟體安全的持續挑戰。
items.summary_en: Microsoft released a record number of patches (622 total) on Patch Tuesday, including critical Exchange Server vulnerabilities. However, a Windows zero-day vulnerability (HiveLegacy) was simultaneously disclosed, described as a "powerful primitive" capable of malicious actions, highlighting ongoing security challenges.

items.title_zh: xAI起訴用戶利用Grok生成兒童性虐待影像
items.title_en: xAI Sues User for Using Grok to Generate Child Sexual Abuse Material
items.summary_zh: Elon Musk旗下xAI公司起訴南卡羅來納州男性用戶Terry Wayne Harwood，指控其利用Grok聊天機器人繞過安全防護、篡改非自願影像並生成和散布兒童性虐待材料。此案凸顯AI公司在防止濫用方面的法律責任問題。
items.summary_en: xAI sued a South Carolina man for allegedly using its Grok chatbot to circumvent safeguards, alter non-consensual images, and generate child sexual abuse material. The lawsuit highlights AI companies' legal responsibility in preventing platform misuse for illegal content generation.

items.title_zh: 日本冷鏈龍頭Nichirei遭駭引發供應鏈危機
items.title_en: Japanese Cold Chain Giant Nichirei Hit by Cyberattack, Supply Chain Disrupted
items.summary_zh: 日本知名食品與低溫物流集團Nichirei遭網路攻擊，冷藏倉庫和冷凍食品出貨作業中斷。此事已影響日本肯德基、藏壽司和零售巨頭永旺等多家業者，導致食材短缺並迫使部分業者暫停營業。這起針對物流中樞的攻擊凸顯關鍵基礎設施的脆弱性。
items.summary_en: Japanese food and cold logistics giant Nichirei suffered a cyberattack that halted refrigerated warehouse and frozen food shipment operations. The incident affected major retailers and restaurants including KFC Japan, Kura Sushi, and Aeon, forcing some businesses to temporarily close due to food shortages. The attack on critical supply chain infrastructure reveals systemic vulnerabilities.

items.title_en: Progress Patches ShareFile Zero-Day Vulnerability Affecting Enterprise Users
items.summary_zh: IT廠商Progress於7月10日發布緊急通知，要求ShareFile用戶關閉Storage Zone Controller伺服器因應外部安全威脅。本週Progress向媒體披露事故源於零時差漏洞，凸顯企業雲端存儲服務面臨的安全隱患。
items.summary_en: IT company Progress issued emergency notifications requiring ShareFile users to disable Storage Zone Controller servers due to external security threats. This week Progress revealed the root cause was a zero-day vulnerability, highlighting security risks in enterprise cloud storage services.

items.title_zh: AWS宣布2026為Agent AI元年推出企業AI代理平台
items.title_en: AWS Declares 2026 the Year of Agent AI, Launches Enterprise Platform
items.summary_zh: AWS在Summit Taipei大會宣布2026為「Agent AI元年」，正式推出涵蓋AI代理開發、執行、知識管理、軟體維運和資安治理的完整企業平台。此舉標誌著企業AI競爭重點從大型語言模型本身轉向實際工作流程應用。
items.summary_en: AWS declared 2026 the "Year of Agent AI" at AWS Summit Taipei, launching a comprehensive enterprise platform covering AI agent development, deployment, knowledge management, operations, and security governance. This marks a shift in enterprise AI competition from LLMs themselves to practical workflow applications.

items.title_zh: 蘋果尋求收購晶片公司強化AI伺服器能力
items.title_en: Apple Reportedly Seeking Chip Company Acquisition to Bolster AI Server Capabilities
items.summary_zh: 據The Information報導，蘋果正尋求收購晶片公司以強化其AI伺服器處理器研發能力。此舉顯示蘋果致力於降低對外部晶片供應商的依賴，並加強自有AI基礎設施建設。
items.summary_en: According to The Information, Apple is seeking to acquire a chip company to enhance its AI server processor development capabilities. This move demonstrates Apple's efforts to reduce reliance on external chip suppliers and strengthen its proprietary AI infrastructure.

items.title_en: SpaceX Stock Falls Below $135 IPO Price Amid Investor Sentiment Decline
items.summary_zh: 馬斯克旗下SpaceX股價連續4個交易日下跌，首次跌破135美元的首次公開募股發行價。市場對SpaceX前景的狂熱已逐漸消退，反映投資人對馬斯克的承諾持保留態度。
items.summary_en: SpaceX shares fell below the $135 IPO price for the first time after four consecutive trading days of declines. Investor enthusiasm has cooled significantly, reflecting skepticism about CEO Elon Musk's stated promises for the company.
